task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'CSS Compatibility Research' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a folder named 'CSS Compatibility Research' in the Firefox Bookmarks Toolbar, Bookmarks Menu, or Library/Bookmark Manager window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the bookmark folder contains at least five bookmarks from the required sources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the 'CSS Compatibility Research' folder. There should be at least 5 bookmarks, and their titles/URLs should indicate they are from MDN Web Docs, Can I Use, or W3C/CSSWG.

task_completion.description: Verify that the file 'css_compatibility_report.json' was created in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window showing 'css_compatibility_report.json' in the 'Documents' directory, or a terminal/editor showing this file path.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JSON report includes all five required CSS features.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the contents of the JSON file. It must contain entries for Container Queries, :has() pseudo-class, Subgrid, color-mix() function, and CSS Nesting.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JSON report contains the required data fields for each feature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the JSON structure for each feature. It must include fields for the first supported version in Chrome, Firefox, and Safari, the specification status (e.g., Working Draft, CR), and a recommendation.

task_completion.description: Verify that the version numbers in the JSON report are accurate within the allowed tolerance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Compare the version numbers in the JSON file against the privileged information. They must be within 10 major versions of the true values.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Firefox browser to research the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing Firefox open and navigating to caniuse.com, developer.mozilla.org, or w3.org/drafts.csswg.org.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Firefox GUI to create the bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the Firefox bookmarking UI (e.g., clicking the star icon, using the 'Add Bookmark' dialog, or managing bookmarks in the Library window).

integrity.description: Verify the output file is actually formatted as JSON.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the report file to ensure it uses valid JSON syntax (curly braces, quoted keys, proper commas) rather than plain text or markdown.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Version tolerance: +/- 10 major versions. Container Queries: Chrome 107, Firefox 110, Safari 16.6. :has(): Chrome 105, Firefox 121, Safari 15.4. Subgrid: Chrome 117, Firefox 71, Safari 16. color-mix(): Chrome 111, Firefox 113, Safari 16.2. CSS Nesting: Chrome 120, Firefox 117, Safari 17.2.
